summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of all 8 redesign changes for Benjamin Kurtz Academy. All 14 specified features pass. Hero subline/CTA, ServicesSection, StatementSection padding, section order, ProcessSection, CaseStudies avatars, BookingSection accordion, and Header CTA all working correctly.
action_items: MOCKED: BookingSection calendar accordion shows placeholder text (REACT_APP_CALENDAR_EMBED not set) - expected behavior per spec
Podcast and Testimonials sections use <div id=...> containers instead of <section id=...> - minor semantic inconsistency but not a bug
critical_code_review_comments: SectionWrapper did not pass through data-testid attribute (fixed during testing by adding ...rest spread to SectionWrapper.jsx)
Podcast and Testimonials sections use <div> wrappers with id, while all other sections use SectionWrapper (<section>). Inconsistency but functional.
BookingSection: REACT_APP_CALENDAR_EMBED env var not set, so placeholder text shows correctly per mocked spec
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 redesign changes verified working: (1) HeroV3Section: subline below headline, 'Bist du bereit zuzuhören?' centered below video, scroll arrow scrolls to #services. (2) ServicesSection: 3 items with dividers, appears before WelcomeSection. (3) StatementSection: py-10 inner padding (40px computed). (4) Section order correct per App.js. (5) ProcessSection: 3 big background numbers (opacity 0.07, 176px), tree SVG icons - step1=roots only (5 paths), step2=roots+trunk (5 paths+line), step3=full tree (5 paths+line+circle). (6) CaseStudiesSection: circular avatars with person silhouettes before each accordion item, 3 accordions. (7) BookingSection: inline accordion opens (maxHeight 0px->900px), no external navigation, placeholder text shows. (8) Header CTA shows 'INTRO CALL'. SectionWrapper now passes data-testid via ...rest spread (fixed by testing agent).

features_tested.hero_subline_below_headline: PASS - subline text 'Seelenrückführung · Hypnose...' found in pt-28 container below h1
features_tested.hero_cta_below_video: PASS - data-testid='hero-cta-scroll' div with 'Bist du bereit zuzuhören?' centered below video
features_tested.hero_scroll_arrow_clickable: PASS - button in hero-cta-scroll scrolled page from 0 to 1582px
features_tested.services_section_3_items: PASS - Seelenrückführung, Hypnose, Energiearbeit all present
features_tested.statement_reduced_padding: PASS - .py-10 class on inner div, computed padding 40px
features_tested.section_order: PASS - hero/services/welcome/statement/was-ist/fuer-wen/ueber/prozess/cases/booking in correct order (podcast/testimonials use div not section)
features_tested.process_tree_icons: PASS - step1=roots(5 paths), step2=roots+trunk(5 paths+line), step3=full tree(5 paths+line+circle)
features_tested.case_studies_avatars: PASS - circular avatar SVGs in .w-12.h-12.rounded-full on all 3 accordion items
features_tested.booking_accordion_opens: PASS - maxHeight transitions 0px->900px on click, no external navigation
features_tested.booking_calendar_placeholder: PASS - 'Kalender-Embed wird hier eingebettet.' visible when opened (MOCKED)
features_tested.plr_de_hero_heroCta: PASS - hero.heroCta = 'Bist du bereit zuzuhören?' in plr-de.js
